title: Prism Shores – “Magical Thinking”
author: Chris DeVille

The post Prism Shores – “Magical Thinking” appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
All these Prism Shores tracks are so appealing! The Montreal band has thus far previewed new album Softest Attack with "Kid Gloves" and "I Didn't Mean To Change My Mind." Now comes "Magical Thinking," which applies some shoegazey guitar moans to Prism Shores' pristine jangle. If you are feeling like you can't listen to the Lemonheads due to recent events, this might fill the void, though there's a loopy Pavement quality beneath the dreamy sheen too. Listen below.

Softest Attack is out 4/10 on Meritorio. Pre-order it!
